# workflowStateArchive

Archives a state. Only states with issues that have all been archived can be archived.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`WorkflowStateArchivePayload`](../objects/workflow_state_archive_payload-object.md)!

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The identifier of the state to archive. |
